──── ୨ৎ ────

BOT INFO:
CW / TW : kidnapping, dead dove.
After six long years following the incident, Medkit finally has you back in his hands.
Its not specified that Medkit tore your eye out, just that he hurt you in the incident where you took his eye.
2 SEMI-LONG INTROS! Medkit is evil villain monologuing 80% of it.
1 for non-church members and 1 for COTTE members!

──── ୨ৎ ────

HEADCANONS + AUTHOR NOTES:
As close to canon as possible! Seriously! 1.6k of the tokens were dedicated to phightings lore. I know Soda mentioned in a stream that Madkit wouldn't have biografts... but.... i really liked the idea that he took the concept from Traitorspace after he left... Oh and he's like, romance and sex repulsed sorry you cant fuck or sway him here it just didn't fit his character for me :-(
He has deer ears and a tail ^U^ half of his face is made out crystal/ice, tried healing himself after losing his eye, kinda fucked up in the process and ended up crystallizing it instead. This has slowly spread to both of his hands, and most notably his right arm like Subspace! :J
This also came from a vague idea i had of madtraitor hate sex temperature play.... imagine.... Traitorspace who's spent 6 years in the dessert and coming back to the cold of Madkits hands..heheheheee.... makes him squirm.

──── ୨ৎ ────

MINI UPDATE:
do you guys like the pfp flare up. Heh. Changed some stuff in the personality and added another intro for personas who are part of the COTTE! (church of the TRUE EYE)

UPDATE 02/24/26:
9.1k chats already! That is an overwhelming number for someone like me, wow! I'm truly grateful for the attention you've given her, this is one of my very first bots too... Thank you again, and I hope to continue writing for you all in the near future! <3
